title: GET /api/timeline/:topicSlug/:dateKey Response
description: Response shape returned by the /api/timeline/:topicSlug/:dateKey Pages Function. Returns paginated alerts for a topic/day, newest first. Supports optional `limit` and `before` (ISO-8601 cursor) query parameters.

alerts.description: Ordered list of active alerts for the topic and date, newest first.

id.description: Primary key of the alert row in D1.

headline.description: Short, factual headline for the alert.

summary_text.description: One to two sentence summary of the event.

source_url.description: URL to the original source article.

severity_score.description: How disruptive or urgent the event is. 0 = no impact, 100 = extreme disruption.

importance_score.description: How broadly relevant the event is to the topic audience.

confidence_score.description: AI confidence in the classification and scores.

event_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the event occurred.

total.description: Total number of active alerts for this topic/day (unpaginated count).

has_more.description: True when there are more alerts beyond the current page. Use the oldest `event_at` as the `before` cursor to load the next page.

alerts.headline: Bitcoin Hits New All-Time High Above $120K
alerts.summary_text: Bitcoin surged past $120,000 driven by strong institutional inflows and ETF demand.
